summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 11 features: Diploma track checkout (4-step process) and Admin Diploma Students page. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/diploma-enrollments returns 401 without authentication
Backend: POST /api/diploma-enrollments/{id}/submit-installment-2 returns 401 without auth
Backend: Admin login works with correct password (OEC@Admin#2026!Secure)
Backend: GET /api/admin/diploma-enrollments returns array of diploma enrollments
Backend: GET /api/admin/diploma-enrollments requires admin auth (401 without)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/diploma-enrollments/{id} requires admin auth
Backend: PUT /api/admin/diploma-enrollments/{id}/installment-2 requires admin auth
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns array of tracks
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks/{track_id} returns track details
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks/{invalid_id} returns 404
Backend: GET /api/notifications requires auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/courses returns array of courses
Frontend: Home page loads with OEC Tech Institute branding
Frontend: Diploma Tracks page loads with 'Digital Marketing Diploma' track
Frontend: TrackCheckout at /checkout/track/:trackId correctly redirects unauthenticated users to login
Frontend: TrackCheckout.jsx has 4-step process (Admission Form, Documents, Payment, Confirm)
Frontend: TrackCheckout Step 1 has admission form fields (full_name, phone, dob, gender, city, father_name, father_phone)
Frontend: TrackCheckout Step 3 shows installment breakdown and two screenshot upload areas (Admission Fee + 1st Installment)
Frontend: TrackCheckout order summary shows PayNow amount and individual course fees
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students page at /admin/diploma-students loads with data-testid
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 6 nav items (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments, Admissions, Diploma)
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students has filter tabs (All, Pending, Approved, Rejected)
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students has search input
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students has fee screenshot buttons (Adm Fee, 1st Inst)
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students has Approve/Reject buttons for pending enrollments
Frontend: Admin Diploma Students fee screenshot modal opens and closes correctly
Frontend: All admin pages (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Enrollments, Admissions) have 6 nav items
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (1 diploma enrollment found in system)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested new diploma track checkout (4-step process at /checkout/track/:trackId) and Admin Diploma Students page (/admin/diploma-students). TrackCheckout requires Google OAuth login so full E2E testing not possible via Playwright - page correctly redirects unauthenticated users to login. Admin Diploma Students page has filter tabs (All, Pending, Approved, Rejected), search input, fee screenshot buttons (Adm Fee, 1st Inst, 2nd Inst), and Approve/Reject buttons. All admin sidebar pages now have 6 nav items. Backend endpoints for diploma enrollments all require proper authentication. Diploma tracks available: track_digital_marketing (2 courses), track_ecommerce, track_web_design.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)
